title: Michael Saylor Posts Bitcoin Portfolio Tracker Again, Signalling Strategy (MSTR) Is About to Buy More BTC
description: Michael Saylor, co-founder and executive chairman of Strategy (NASDAQ: MSTR), has once again shared his company’s Bitcoin purchase history chart on social media, a move that has reliably preceded a new acquisition announcement across 107 transactions since 2020, giving the crypto market a fairly reliable leading indicator that another substantial Bitcoin purchase is imminent. Strategy […]The post Michael Saylor Posts Bitcoin Portfolio Tracker Again, Signalling Strategy (MSTR) Is About to Buy More BTC appeared first on Foreign Policy Journal.
